_comment: Lowest Cost mode routing. Read by AgentModelRouter (per-task-category ladders) and AIHarness's early auto-router (providerOrder). Best Quality mode continues to use the legacy Resources/Tunables/routing.json + the hardcoded Best Quality ladders in AgentModelRouter.swift — those are explicitly NOT touched here per Lawrence's request. This file ONLY shapes Lowest Cost behavior. Edit + git push + (relaunch OR `refreshMchataisourceCache` tunnel) ships changes with no Swift rebuild.

earlyAutoRouter._comment: Used by AIHarness.send() at the early auto-router block. When mode == .lowestCost the wizard walks this providerOrder, picks first grid-green + available. Order matches the ladders below: local first, then cloud-credit, then frontier APIs.

ladders._comment: Per-TaskCategory ladders. AgentModelRouter.recommend(category:availability:preferCost:true) walks the matching ladder, picks first available. Each step: provider name (matches AppletProvider.fromConfigName), optional model name, reason string surfaced in the wizard's 'Using **X** (reason)' message.

coding.reason: Local Ollama — Lowest Cost prefers free local inference
Claude Sonnet 4.6 — frontier fallback when local + cloud-credit options exhausted
On-device model — last-resort fallback when other routes are unavailable

planning.reason: Local Ollama — Lowest Cost prefers free local planning

analysis.reason: Local Ollama — Lowest Cost prefers free local analysis

research.reason: Local Ollama — Lowest Cost prefers free local research

creative.reason: Local Ollama — Lowest Cost prefers free local generation

simple.reason: Free local model for simple tasks
On-device model — last-resort fallback for simple tasks
